name: ssdlc-autopilot
description: SSDLC Autopilot: 9-Agent 異質多代理協作網路 (Multi-Agent Orchestration) for secure software development. Zero-Trust cross-validation with Claude, Gemini, and Codex.
author: SL-Nestor

skills.name: pm
skills.description: 🎯 SSDLC 入口路由 — 判斷開發模式，分派 Agent 任務

skills.name: req-analyst
skills.description: 📋 需求分析師 — 模糊業務需求 → 結構化 requirements.md

skills.name: spec-architect
skills.description: 🏗️ 規格架構師 — 需求 → Mermaid 架構圖 + BDD 任務清單

skills.name: threat-modeler
skills.description: 🛡️ 威脅建模師 (Gemini) — STRIDE 安全評估，交叉驗證規格

skills.name: implementer
skills.description: 💻 實作工程師 (Codex) — TDD 驅動程式碼實作

skills.name: code-reviewer
skills.description: 🔍 程式碼審查員 (Gemini) — 交叉驗證審查，不審查自己寫的代碼

skills.name: test-engineer
skills.description: 🧪 測試工程師 — E2E + Edge Case + 資安負面測試

skills.name: security-gate
skills.description: 🔒 安全閘口 (Claude) — 部署前最終驗證，PASS/FAIL 無中間地帶

skills.name: devops
skills.description: 🚀 DevOps 工程師 (Codex) — CI/CD Pipeline 產出

skills.name: doubt-driven-development
skills.description: 🤔 懷疑驅動開發 — 對非瑣碎決策進行新鮮上下文的對抗性審查

mcps.name: cavemem
mcps.description: 🪨 Cross-agent persistent memory (optional). Stores SSDLC decisions compressed in local SQLite. Enables agents to recall past phase decisions, threat findings, and Gate verdicts across sessions and across AI models (Claude → Gemini → Codex). Install separately: npm install -g cavemem && cavemem install

installHooks.postInstall:
echo 'SSDLC Autopilot installed. Start with: $pm [your task]'
echo 'Optional: npm install -g cavemem && cavemem install  # Cross-session memory'
